areas.name: Generalized linear models
areas.summary: Models for proportions and fractional outcomes, log-transformed and exponential models, and binary, two-part, and multinomial models.

areas.name: Statistical inference
areas.summary: Sample-size-dependent significance thresholds and the sound use of null hypothesis significance testing.

areas.name: Sensitivity analysis
areas.summary: How robust published estimates are to omitted confounding — and how to run and report sensitivity analysis correctly.

areas.name: Meta-science
areas.summary: Replication, analytical robustness, and common methodological mistakes in the social and behavioural sciences.

areas.name: Multiple imputation
areas.summary: Practical guidance and methods for handling missing data, from chained equations to multilevel imputation.

areas.name: Deep learning
areas.summary: Computer vision and transformer models applied to finance and business processes.

areas.name: Corporate finance
areas.summary: CEO personality and behaviour, acquisitions, and firm dynamics.

areas.name: Public administration
areas.summary: Discrimination, leadership, values, and performance in public organizations.

areas.name: Social epidemiology
areas.summary: Register-based studies of socioeconomic position, mental health, and disease risk.
